name: conceal-lib-js
description: Conceal Network cryptographic primitives — hybrid library routing calls to Rust/WASM or native JavaScript depending on the operation
author: Conceal Devs
prepack: npm run build && npm run types

scripts.build:crypto: cd rust/crypto && wasm-pack build --target bundler --out-dir ../../src/wasm/crypto && echo -n > ../../src/wasm/crypto/.gitignore
scripts.build:cypher: cd rust/cypher && wasm-pack build --target bundler --out-dir ../../src/wasm/cypher && echo -n > ../../src/wasm/cypher/.gitignore
scripts.build:browser:crypto: cd rust/crypto && wasm-pack build --target web --out-dir ../../src/wasm-browser/crypto && echo -n > ../../src/wasm-browser/crypto/.gitignore
scripts.build:browser:cypher: cd rust/cypher && wasm-pack build --target web --out-dir ../../src/wasm-browser/cypher && echo -n > ../../src/wasm-browser/cypher/.gitignore
scripts.build:browser: npm run build:browser:crypto && npm run build:browser:cypher
scripts.build: npm run build:crypto && npm run build:cypher && npm run build:browser
scripts.build:test: npm run build:test:crypto && npm run build:test:cypher
scripts.release: npm run build && npm run types && npm pack
